content.json:
# Network Availability — Endpoint SLO Rollup
**Theme:** Network availability · **Data source:** `NWConnectionMonitorTestResult` + `Heartbeat`.

Composite availability % and downtime rollups for SLO reporting.

> SLO target (99.9%) and the 15-minute downtime threshold are tunable starting points.

content.query: NWConnectionMonitorTestResult | summarize Total=count(), Pass=countif(TestResult == 'Pass') | extend AvailabilityPct=round(100.0 * Pass / Total, 3)
content.title: Overall availability %

content.query: NWConnectionMonitorTestResult | summarize Total=count(), Pass=countif(TestResult == 'Pass') by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | extend AvailabilityPct=round(100.0 * Pass / Total, 3) | project TimeGenerated, AvailabilityPct | render timechart
content.title: Availability SLO trend

content.query: NWConnectionMonitorTestResult | summarize Total=count(), Pass=countif(TestResult == 'Pass') by DestinationName | extend AvailabilityPct=round(100.0 * Pass / Total, 3) | sort by AvailabilityPct asc | take 20
content.title: Worst-performing endpoints

content.query: Heartbeat | summarize LastSeen=max(TimeGenerated) by Computer | extend DownMinutes=datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen) | where DownMinutes > 15 | sort by DownMinutes desc
content.title: Hosts with heartbeat downtime (> 15m)
